name: Pistachio Olive Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Greek Olives, Pitted and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour an 8-inch loaf pan.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, stir and toss together the flour, sugar (if used), baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the milk, oil, and eggs until smooth. Stir in the pistachios and olives.
5. Add to the combined dry ingredients and stir just until blended.
6. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Bake until a thin wooden skewer inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean, about 50 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
